    Material notes

    What the physical side should feel like

    Surface Readability first

    Plain materials, clear labels

    Paper, clay, cloth, light. The words stay ordinary so the work can carry the texture.

    Motion Hover straighten

    A small amount of lift is enough

    The repo feedback keeps asking for gentle motion, not a flashy gallery wall.
